name: 6-factor-docs
title: 6-factor-docs
summary: Audit and refactor documentation systems for positioning, first-run onboarding, information architecture, examples, accuracy, maintenance, and Agent handoff readiness.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 6-factor-docs skill to audit this repository documentation for positioning, onboarding, information architecture, examples, accuracy, maintenance, and Agent handoff readiness.
Use the 6-factor-docs skill to refactor this project's README, guides, examples, and release notes so a new user can complete the first useful action in under five minutes.
expected_inputs: package metadata and CLI help if docs reference commands
known onboarding friction or user questions
review_protocol: Identify the target reader and first useful action.
Review README, docs tree, examples, and release notes for consistency.
Apply the 6-factor checklist and score the documentation.
